heading: Approval of applications for assistance
label: 15503 Approval of applications for assistance
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first fiscal year beginning after , see , set out as a note under .June 18, 2008section 14217(d) of Pub. L. 110–246section 15101 of this title

children.heading: .—Evaluation by State Member
children.label: a .—Evaluation by State Member
children.text: An application to a Commission for a grant or any other assistance for a project under this subtitle shall be made through, and evaluated for approval by, the State member of the Commission representing the applicant.
describes ways in which the project complies with any applicable State economic and infrastructure development plan;
adequately ensures that the project will be properly administered, operated, and maintained; and
otherwise meets the requirements for assistance under this subtitle.

children.heading: .—Votes for Decisions
children.label: c .—Votes for Decisions
children.text: On certification by a State member of a Commission of an application for a grant or other assistance for a specific project under this section, an affirmative vote of the Commission under section 15302 shall be required for approval of the application.
